The Greenhouse.

A private forum for members. The conversations that begin in the seed library and continue through The Almanac find their home here. Accessible to all members of the Society.

The Greenhouse is for members.

Join the Society to access the forum, the full seed library, and The Almanac.

H
GrowingActive

What are you direct-seeding right now? (Zone 5 check-in)

We had our last frost May 9 here in St. Johnsbury. I've got beets, carrots, and the Cornichon de Paris in the ground. The runners go in next weekend when the soil finally warms...

T
Pressing

Technique question: keeping blues from fading

I've been losing blue colors — cornflower, borage — to a sort of grey wash after about a year in the herbarium. Has anyone found a reliable way to set them? I've tried silica gel and the low-heat method...

The Almanac

Thoughts on the 'Ethics of the Hybrid' piece in No. 9

Thomas's piece got me thinking about where exactly we draw the line when we talk about 'heirloom.' If a variety has been maintained for fifty years, is it still a hybrid? Or does it become something else...

Successfully overwintered the Black Hollyhock — notes

This was my third attempt with the Antwerp Black. The key turned out to be the mulching approach — six inches of straw after a hard frost, not before...

General

Apothecary

Calendula harvest timing — when to pick for maximum resin

The window is narrower than most guides suggest. I've found the resin content peaks very specifically in the first six hours after opening on a sunny morning...

"The Greenhouse is a place for genuine exchange. We ask only that you bring the same quality of attention here that you bring to the garden."

— May 2025

The conversations are better inside.

The Marigold Society

A Vermont seed library, pressed-flower atelier, and quarterly journal for those who believe the old ways are worth preserving.
